Motion To Compel Further Production Of Documents To Plaintiffs Request For Production Of Documents; Declaration Of Zarif Kazi
Off Calendar Mar-30-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Taylor Dordick, Esq. 310-551-0949 Dordick Law Corporation for Plaintiff.
Ilana Shoyket, Esq. 415-353-0999 Bertran Fox Elliot Osman Wenzel for Defendant.
Court Reporter Vienna Nguyen, CSR #13137, 949-295-5737, viennanguyen@gmail.com

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received. Only motion #3 - Motion to compel Further Production of Documents is contested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling on Motion #1 and Motion #2.

ARGUED.

Ms. Dordick presents arguments; meet and confer efforts, sanctions, sending a protective order not meet and confer, responses provided with objections.
Ms. Shoyket responds, requested extension, no further meet and confer on objections,
Court comments; meet and confer on a discovery referee, case involves sensitive information, meet and confer and stipulate on documents.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

3 - Plaintiff John Doe's Motion To Compel Further Production of Documents to Plaintiff's RFP.

Taken Under Submission.***

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter Vienna Nguyen, CSR #13137, 949-295-5737, viennanguyen@gmail.com, Reported. (302/JMQ)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-08-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendant San Francisco Unified School District's demurrer to Plaintiff John Doe (L.)'s Complaint is OVERRRULED as to COA 1, 2, and 5, and SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND as to COA 3.

(see word minutes for full details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Visiting Judge: Cindee Mayfield, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/CM)
